title: VL_CONSTHI_W_?X in verilated.h will bring a memory access violation.

features.name: large unpacked array with concatenation assignment
features.description: Code should include a large unpacked array (over 1000 bits) assigned via concatenation with unsized decimal literals

features.name: else-if chain with bit-slice conditions on large array
features.description: Code should include an if-else-if chain where conditions check individual bits of a small input wire while assigning to a very large unpacked array output
